title: Chickens Shed Feathers
description: Chickens will sometimes drop feathers instead of eggs!
body:
![Logo spelling the project's title, styled similarly to the official Minecraft log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9b38ca1250b12ff74eb84c619b6bab739912f0c.png) # Chickens sometimes shed feathers With this data pack installed, chickens will shed a feather every 7.5 to 15 minutes. ## Compatibility Since this data pack only adds, but does not replace any data pack contents, it should be compatible with any other data pack. ---
*README, Modrinth version*
